3namespace App\Controller;
4
5use App\Service\PapertrailService;
6use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
7use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\JsonResponse;
8use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
9use Symfony\Component\Routing\Attribute\Route;
10use App\Entity\User;
11use App\Entity\Skills;
12use App\Entity\Project;
13use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
14use Symfony\Component\PasswordHasher\Hasher\UserPasswordHasherInterface;
15use Symfony\Bundle\SecurityBundle\Security;
16use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
17use App\Service\UserService;
18
19final class UserController extends AbstractController
20{
21    private EntityManagerInterface $manager;
22    private $userRepository;
23    private UserService $userService;
24
25    public function __construct(
26        EntityManagerInterface $manager,
27        UserService $userService,
28        private PapertrailService $papertrailLogger,
29    ) {
30        $this->manager        = $manager;
31        $this->userRepository = $this->manager->getRepository(User::class);
32        $this->userService    = $userService;
33    }
34
35    #[Route('/api/userCreate', name: 'user_create', methods: ['POST'])]
36    public function userCreate(Request $request, UserPasswordHasherInterface $passwordHasher): JsonResponse
37    {
38        $data = json_decode($request->getContent(), true);
39
40        $email             = $data['email']             ?? null;
41        $password          = $data['password']          ?? null;
42        $firstName         = $data['firstName']         ?? null;
43        $lastName          = $data['lastName']          ?? null;
44        $availabilityStart = $data['availabilityStart'] ?? null;
45        $availabilityEnd   = $data['availabilityEnd']   ?? null;
46
47        $this->papertrailLogger->info('User creation attempt', [
48            'email' => $email,
49        ]);
50
51        if (!$email || !$password) {
52            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('User creation - missing email or password', [
53                'email' => $email,
54            ]);
55            return new JsonResponse([
56                'status'  => false,
57                'message' => 'Email and password are required'
58            ], 400);
59        }
60
61        $emailExists = $this->userRepository->findOneBy(['email' => $email]);
62        if ($emailExists) {
63            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('User creation - email already in use', [
64                'email' => $email,
65            ]);
66            return new JsonResponse([
67                'status'  => false,
68                'message' => 'This email is already in use'
69            ], 409);
70        }
71
72        if ($availabilityStart || $availabilityEnd) {
73            $today = new \DateTimeImmutable();
74
75            if ($availabilityStart) {
76                $startDate = new \DateTimeImmutable($availabilityStart);
77                if ($startDate < $today) {
78                    $this->papertrailLogger->warning('User creation - availabilityStart in the past', [
79                        'email' => $email,
80                        'value' => $availabilityStart,
81                    ]);
82                    return new JsonResponse([
83                        'status'  => false,
84                        'message' => 'La date de début de disponibilité doit être dans le futur'
85                    ], 400);
86                }
87            }
88
89            if ($availabilityEnd) {
90                $endDate = new \DateTimeImmutable($availabilityEnd);
91                if ($endDate < $today) {
92                    $this->papertrailLogger->warning('User creation - availabilityEnd in the past', [
93                        'email' => $email,
94                        'value' => $availabilityEnd,
95                    ]);
96                    return new JsonResponse([
97                        'status'  => false,
98                        'message' => 'La date de fin de disponibilité doit être dans le futur'
99                    ], 400);
100                }
101            }
102
103            if ($availabilityStart && $availabilityEnd && $endDate < $startDate) {
104                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('User creation - endDate before startDate', [
105                    'email'             => $email,
106                    'availabilityStart' => $availabilityStart,
107                    'availabilityEnd'   => $availabilityEnd,
108                ]);
109                return new JsonResponse([
110                    'status'  => false,
111                    'message' => 'La date de fin doit être après la date de début'
112                ], 400);
113            }
114        }
115
116        $user = new User();
117        $user->setEmail($email);
118        $user->setPassword($passwordHasher->hashPassword($user, $password));
119        $user->setFirstName($firstName);
120        $user->setLastName($lastName);
121        $user->setRoles(['ROLE_USER']);
122        $user->setAvailabilityStart($availabilityStart ? new \DateTimeImmutable($availabilityStart) : null);
123        $user->setAvailabilityEnd($availabilityEnd ? new \DateTimeImmutable($availabilityEnd) : null);
124
125        $this->manager->persist($user);
126        $this->manager->flush();
127
128        $this->papertrailLogger->info('✅ User created successfully', [
129            'user_id' => $user->getId(),
130            'email'   => $user->getEmail(),
131        ]);
132
133        return new JsonResponse([
134            'status'  => true,
135            'message' => 'User created successfully',
136            'user'    => [
137                'id'                => $user->getId(),
138                'email'             => $user->getEmail(),
139                'firstName'         => $user->getFirstName(),
140                'lastName'          => $user->getLastName(),
141                'availabilityStart' => $user->getAvailabilityStart()?->format('Y-m-d'),
142                'availabilityEnd'   => $user->getAvailabilityEnd()?->format('Y-m-d'),
143                'skills'            => $user->getSkills(),
144            ]
145        ], 201);
146    }
147
148    #[Route('/api/getAllUsers', name: 'get_all_users', methods: ['GET'])]
149    public function getAllUsers(): JsonResponse
150    {
151        $users = $this->userRepository->findAll();
152
153        $this->papertrailLogger->info('All users fetched', [
154            'count' => count($users),
155        ]);
156
157        $result = array_map(fn(User $user) => [
158            'id'                => $user->getId(),
159            'email'             => $user->getEmail(),
160            'firstName'         => $user->getFirstName(),
161            'lastName'          => $user->getLastName(),
162            'availabilityStart' => $user->getAvailabilityStart()?->format('Y-m-d'),
163            'availabilityEnd'   => $user->getAvailabilityEnd()?->format('Y-m-d'),
164        ], $users);
165
166        return new JsonResponse($result);
167    }
168
169    #[Route('/api/getConnectedUser', name: 'get_connected_user', methods: ['GET'])]
170    public function getConnectedUser(Security $security): JsonResponse
171    {
172        $user = $security->getUser();
173
174        if (!$user) {
175            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('getConnectedUser - user not authenticated');
176            return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'User not authenticated'], 401);
177        }
178
179        if (!$user instanceof User) {
180            $userEntity = $this->userRepository->findOneBy(['email' => $user->getUserIdentifier()]);
181            if (!$userEntity) {
182                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('getConnectedUser - user entity not found', [
183                    'identifier' => $user->getUserIdentifier(),
184                ]);
185                return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'User entity not found'], 404);
186            }
187            $user = $userEntity;
188        }
189
190        $userData = $this->userService->findAll($user);
191
192        $this->papertrailLogger->info('Connected user fetched', [
193            'user_id' => $user->getId(),
194        ]);
195
196        return new JsonResponse([
197            'id'                => $user->getId(),
198            'email'             => $user->getEmail(),
199            'firstName'         => $user->getFirstName(),
200            'lastName'          => $user->getLastName(),
201            'availabilityStart' => $user->getAvailabilityStart()?->format('Y-m-d'),
202            'availabilityEnd'   => $user->getAvailabilityEnd()?->format('Y-m-d'),
203            'userData'          => $userData,
204        ]);
205    }
206
207    #[Route('/api/user/skills', name: 'api_user_skills', methods: ['GET'])]
208    public function getUserSkills(Security $security): JsonResponse
209    {
210        $user = $security->getUser();
211
212        if (!$user instanceof User) {
213            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('getUserSkills - user not authenticated');
214            return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'User not authenticated'], 401);
215        }
216
217        try {
218            $skills = $user->getSkills();
219
220            $this->papertrailLogger->info('User skills fetched', [
221                'user_id' => $user->getId(),
222                'count'   => count($skills),
223            ]);
224
225            $data = [];
226            foreach ($skills as $skill) {
227                $data[] = [
228                    'id'              => $skill->getId(),
229                    'name'            => $skill->getName(),
230                    'description'     => $skill->getDescription(),
231                    'duree'           => $skill->getDuree() ? $skill->getDuree()->format('Y-m-d') : null,
232                    'technoUtilisees' => $skill->getTechnoUtilisees(),
233                ];
234            }
235
236            return new JsonResponse($data);
237        } catch (\Exception $e) {
238            $this->papertrailLogger->error('Error fetching user skills', [
239                'user_id' => $user->getId(),
240                'error'   => $e->getMessage(),
241            ]);
242            return new JsonResponse([
243                'error'   => 'Error fetching user skills',
244                'message' => $e->getMessage()
245            ], 500);
246        }
247    }
248
249    #[Route('/api/skills', name: 'api_skills', methods: ['GET'])]
250    public function getAllSkills(Security $security): JsonResponse
251    {
252        $user = $security->getUser();
253
254        if (!$user instanceof User) {
255            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('getAllSkills - user not authenticated');
256            return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'User not authenticated'], 401);
257        }
258
259        try {
260            $skillsRepo = $this->manager->getRepository(Skills::class);
261            $allSkills  = $skillsRepo->findAll();
262
263            $this->papertrailLogger->info('All skills fetched', [
264                'user_id' => $user->getId(),
265                'count'   => count($allSkills),
266            ]);
267
268            $data = [];
269            foreach ($allSkills as $skill) {
270                try {
271                    $skillData = [
272                        'id'              => $skill->getId(),
273                        'name'            => $skill->getName()            ?? 'N/A',
274                        'description'     => $skill->getDescription()     ?? 'N/A',
275                        'duree'           => null,
276                        'technoUtilisees' => $skill->getTechnoUtilisees() ?? 'N/A',
277                    ];
278
279                    if (method_exists($skill, 'getDuree')) {
280                        $duree = $skill->getDuree();
281                        if ($duree instanceof \DateTimeInterface) {
282                            $skillData['duree'] = $duree->format('Y-m-d');
283                        }
284                    }
285
286                    $data[] = $skillData;
287                } catch (\Exception $e) {
288                    $this->papertrailLogger->warning('Error processing skill', [
289                        'skill_id' => $skill->getId(),
290                        'error'    => $e->getMessage(),
291                    ]);
292                    continue;
293                }
294            }
295
296            return new JsonResponse($data);
297        } catch (\Exception $e) {
298            $this->papertrailLogger->error('Error fetching all skills', [
299                'user_id' => $user->getId(),
300                'error'   => $e->getMessage(),
301            ]);
302            return new JsonResponse([
303                'error'   => 'Error fetching all skills',
304                'message' => $e->getMessage(),
305                'line'    => $e->getLine(),
306                'file'    => basename($e->getFile())
307            ], 500);
308        }
309    }
310
311    #[Route('/api/skills/create', name: 'api_create_skill', methods: ['POST'])]
312    public function createSkill(Request $request, Security $security): JsonResponse
313    {
314        $user = $security->getUser();
315
316        if (!$user instanceof User) {
317            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('createSkill - user not authenticated');
318            return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'User not authenticated'], 401);
319        }
320
321        try {
322            $data = json_decode($request->getContent(), true);
323
324            $this->papertrailLogger->info('Skill creation attempt', [
325                'user_id'    => $user->getId(),
326                'skill_name' => $data['name'] ?? null,
327            ]);
328
329            if (empty($data['name'])) {
330                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('createSkill - missing name', ['user_id' => $user->getId()]);
331                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Skill name is required'], 400);
332            }
333
334            if (empty($data['description'])) {
335                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('createSkill - missing description', ['user_id' => $user->getId()]);
336                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Description is required'], 400);
337            }
338
339            if (empty($data['technoUtilisees'])) {
340                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('createSkill - missing technoUtilisees', ['user_id' => $user->getId()]);
341                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Technologies used is required'], 400);
342            }
343
344            if (empty($data['duree'])) {
345                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('createSkill - missing duree', ['user_id' => $user->getId()]);
346                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Duration is required'], 400);
347            }
348
349            $skillsRepo    = $this->manager->getRepository(Skills::class);
350            $existingSkill = $skillsRepo->findOneBy(['Name' => $data['name']]);
351
352            if ($existingSkill) {
353                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('createSkill - skill name already exists', [
354                    'user_id'    => $user->getId(),
355                    'skill_name' => $data['name'],
356                ]);
357                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'A skill with this name already exists'], 409);
358            }
359
360            $skill = new Skills();
361            $skill->setName($data['name']);
362            $skill->setDescription($data['description']);
363            $skill->setTechnoUtilisees($data['technoUtilisees']);
364
365            try {
366                $duree = new \DateTimeImmutable($data['duree']);
367                $skill->setDuree($duree);
368            } catch (\Exception $e) {
369                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('createSkill - invalid duree format', [
370                    'user_id' => $user->getId(),
371                    'value'   => $data['duree'],
372                    'error'   => $e->getMessage(),
373                ]);
374                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid date format. Use YYYY-MM-DD'], 400);
375            }
376
377            $this->manager->persist($skill);
378            $this->manager->flush();
379
380            $this->papertrailLogger->info('✅ Skill created', [
381                'user_id'    => $user->getId(),
382                'skill_id'   => $skill->getId(),
383                'skill_name' => $skill->getName(),
384            ]);
385
386            return new JsonResponse([
387                'success' => true,
388                'message' => 'Skill created successfully',
389                'skill'   => [
390                    'id'              => $skill->getId(),
391                    'name'            => $skill->getName(),
392                    'description'     => $skill->getDescription(),
393                    'technoUtilisees' => $skill->getTechnoUtilisees(),
394                    'duree'           => $skill->getDuree()->format('Y-m-d')
395                ]
396            ], 201);
397
398        } catch (\Exception $e) {
399            $this->papertrailLogger->error('Error creating skill', [
400                'user_id' => $user->getId(),
401                'error'   => $e->getMessage(),
402            ]);
403            return new JsonResponse([
404                'success' => false,
405                'error'   => 'Error creating skill',
406                'message' => $e->getMessage()
407            ], 500);
408        }
409    }
410
411    #[Route('/api/skills/update/{id}', name: 'api_update_skill', methods: ['PUT', 'PATCH'])]
412    public function updateSkill(int $id, Request $request, Security $security): JsonResponse
413    {
414        $user = $security->getUser();
415
416        if (!$user instanceof User) {
417            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('updateSkill - user not authenticated');
418            return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'User not authenticated'], 401);
419        }
420
421        try {
422            $skillsRepo = $this->manager->getRepository(Skills::class);
423            $skill      = $skillsRepo->find($id);
424
425            if (!$skill) {
426                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('updateSkill - skill not found', [
427                    'user_id'  => $user->getId(),
428                    'skill_id' => $id,
429                ]);
430                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Skill not found'], 404);
431            }
432
433            $data = json_decode($request->getContent(), true);
434
435            $this->papertrailLogger->info('Skill update attempt', [
436                'user_id'  => $user->getId(),
437                'skill_id' => $id,
438                'fields'   => array_keys($data),
439            ]);
440
441            if (isset($data['name'])) {
442                $existingSkill = $skillsRepo->findOneBy(['Name' => $data['name']]);
443                if ($existingSkill && $existingSkill->getId() !== $id) {
444                    $this->papertrailLogger->warning('updateSkill - name already exists', [
445                        'user_id'    => $user->getId(),
446                        'skill_id'   => $id,
447                        'skill_name' => $data['name'],
448                    ]);
449                    return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'A skill with this name already exists'], 409);
450                }
451                $skill->setName($data['name']);
452            }
453
454            if (isset($data['description'])) {
455                $skill->setDescription($data['description']);
456            }
457
458            if (isset($data['technoUtilisees'])) {
459                $skill->setTechnoUtilisees($data['technoUtilisees']);
460            }
461
462            if (isset($data['duree'])) {
463                try {
464                    $skill->setDuree(new \DateTimeImmutable($data['duree']));
465                } catch (\Exception $e) {
466                    $this->papertrailLogger->warning('updateSkill - invalid duree format', [
467                        'user_id'  => $user->getId(),
468                        'skill_id' => $id,
469                        'value'    => $data['duree'],
470                        'error'    => $e->getMessage(),
471                    ]);
472                    return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid date format. Use YYYY-MM-DD'], 400);
473                }
474            }
475
476            $this->manager->flush();
477
478            $this->papertrailLogger->info('✅ Skill updated', [
479                'user_id'  => $user->getId(),
480                'skill_id' => $skill->getId(),
481            ]);
482
483            return new JsonResponse([
484                'success' => true,
485                'message' => 'Skill updated successfully',
486                'skill'   => [
487                    'id'              => $skill->getId(),
488                    'name'            => $skill->getName(),
489                    'description'     => $skill->getDescription(),
490                    'technoUtilisees' => $skill->getTechnoUtilisees(),
491                    'duree'           => $skill->getDuree()->format('Y-m-d')
492                ]
493            ]);
494
495        } catch (\Exception $e) {
496            $this->papertrailLogger->error('Error updating skill', [
497                'user_id'  => $user->getId(),
498                'skill_id' => $id,
499                'error'    => $e->getMessage(),
500            ]);
501            return new JsonResponse([
502                'success' => false,
503                'error'   => 'Error updating skill',
504                'message' => $e->getMessage()
505            ], 500);
506        }
507    }
508
509    #[Route('/api/skills/delete/{id}', name: 'api_delete_skill', methods: ['DELETE'])]
510    public function deleteSkill(int $id, Security $security): JsonResponse
511    {
512        $user = $security->getUser();
513
514        if (!$user instanceof User) {
515            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('deleteSkill - user not authenticated');
516            return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'User not authenticated'], 401);
517        }
518
519        try {
520            $skillsRepo = $this->manager->getRepository(Skills::class);
521            $skill      = $skillsRepo->find($id);
522
523            if (!$skill) {
524                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('deleteSkill - skill not found', [
525                    'user_id'  => $user->getId(),
526                    'skill_id' => $id,
527                ]);
528                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Skill not found'], 404);
529            }
530
531            $skillName = $skill->getName();
532
533            $this->manager->remove($skill);
534            $this->manager->flush();
535
536            $this->papertrailLogger->info('✅ Skill deleted', [
537                'user_id'    => $user->getId(),
538                'skill_id'   => $id,
539                'skill_name' => $skillName,
540            ]);
541
542            return new JsonResponse([
543                'success' => true,
544                'message' => "Skill '$skillName' deleted successfully"
545            ]);
546
547        } catch (\Exception $e) {
548            $this->papertrailLogger->error('Error deleting skill', [
549                'user_id'  => $user->getId(),
550                'skill_id' => $id,
551                'error'    => $e->getMessage(),
552            ]);
553            return new JsonResponse([
554                'success' => false,
555                'error'   => 'Error deleting skill',
556                'message' => $e->getMessage()
557            ], 500);
558        }
559    }
560
561    #[Route('/api/user/add/skills', name: 'api_user_skills_add', methods: ['POST'])]
562    public function addUserSkill(Request $request, Security $security, EntityManagerInterface $em): JsonResponse
563    {
564        $user = $security->getUser();
565        if (!$user instanceof User) {
566            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('addUserSkill - user not authenticated');
567            return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'Utilisateur non connecté'], 401);
568        }
569
570        try {
571            $data    = json_decode($request->getContent(), true);
572            $skillId = $data['skill_id'] ?? null;
573
574            if (!$skillId) {
575                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('addUserSkill - missing skill_id', ['user_id' => $user->getId()]);
576                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'ID de compétence manquant'], 400);
577            }
578
579            $skill = $em->getRepository(Skills::class)->find($skillId);
580            if (!$skill) {
581                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('addUserSkill - skill not found', [
582                    'user_id'  => $user->getId(),
583                    'skill_id' => $skillId,
584                ]);
585                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Compétence non trouvée'], 404);
586            }
587
588            if ($user->getSkills()->contains($skill)) {
589                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('addUserSkill - skill already added', [
590                    'user_id'  => $user->getId(),
591                    'skill_id' => $skillId,
592                ]);
593                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Vous avez déjà cette compétence'], 400);
594            }
595
596            $user->addSkill($skill);
597            $em->persist($user);
598            $em->flush();
599
600            $this->papertrailLogger->info('✅ Skill added to user', [
601                'user_id'    => $user->getId(),
602                'skill_id'   => $skill->getId(),
603                'skill_name' => $skill->getName(),
604            ]);
605
606            return new JsonResponse([
607                'success'    => true,
608                'message'    => 'Compétence ajoutée avec succès',
609                'skill_name' => $skill->getName()
610            ], 201);
611
612        } catch (\Exception $e) {
613            $this->papertrailLogger->error('Error adding skill to user', [
614                'user_id' => $user->getId(),
615                'error'   => $e->getMessage(),
616            ]);
617            return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage()], 500);
618        }
619    }
620
621    #[Route('/api/user/delete/skill', name: 'api_user_skill_delete', methods: ['DELETE'])]
622    public function removeUserSkill(Request $request, Security $security, EntityManagerInterface $em): JsonResponse
623    {
624        $user = $security->getUser();
625        if (!$user instanceof User) {
626            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('removeUserSkill - user not authenticated');
627            return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'Utilisateur non connecté'], 401);
628        }
629
630        try {
631            $data    = json_decode($request->getContent(), true);
632            $skillId = $data['skill_id'] ?? null;
633
634            if (!$skillId) {
635                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('removeUserSkill - missing skill_id', ['user_id' => $user->getId()]);
636                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'ID de compétence manquant'], 400);
637            }
638
639            $skill = $em->getRepository(Skills::class)->find($skillId);
640            if (!$skill) {
641                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('removeUserSkill - skill not found', [
642                    'user_id'  => $user->getId(),
643                    'skill_id' => $skillId,
644                ]);
645                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Compétence non trouvée'], 404);
646            }
647
648            if (!$user->getSkills()->contains($skill)) {
649                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('removeUserSkill - user does not have this skill', [
650                    'user_id'  => $user->getId(),
651                    'skill_id' => $skillId,
652                ]);
653                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Vous ne possédez pas cette compétence'], 400);
654            }
655
656            $user->removeSkill($skill);
657            $em->flush();
658
659            $this->papertrailLogger->info('✅ Skill removed from user', [
660                'user_id'    => $user->getId(),
661                'skill_id'   => $skill->getId(),
662                'skill_name' => $skill->getName(),
663            ]);
664
665            return new JsonResponse([
666                'success'    => true,
667                'message'    => 'Compétence retirée avec succès',
668                'skill_name' => $skill->getName()
669            ], 200);
670
671        } catch (\Exception $e) {
672            $this->papertrailLogger->error('Error removing skill from user', [
673                'user_id' => $user->getId(),
674                'error'   => $e->getMessage(),
675            ]);
676            return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage()], 500);
677        }
678    }
679
680    #[Route('/api/user/availability', name: 'api_user_availability_change', methods: ['POST'])]
681    public function changeAvailability(Request $request, Security $security, EntityManagerInterface $em): JsonResponse
682    {
683        $user = $security->getUser();
684        if (!$user instanceof User) {
685            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('changeAvailability - user not authenticated');
686            return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'Utilisateur non connecté'], 401);
687        }
688
689        try {
690            $data              = json_decode($request->getContent(), true);
691            $availabilityStart = $data['availabilityStart'] ?? null;
692            $availabilityEnd   = $data['availabilityEnd']   ?? null;
693
694            if (!$availabilityStart || !$availabilityEnd) {
695                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('changeAvailability - missing dates', [
696                    'user_id' => $user->getId(),
697                ]);
698                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'availability not sended'], 400);
699            }
700
701            try {
702                $startDate = new \DateTimeImmutable($availabilityStart);
703            } catch (\Exception $e) {
704                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('changeAvailability - invalid availabilityStart', [
705                    'user_id' => $user->getId(),
706                    'value'   => $availabilityStart,
707                    'error'   => $e->getMessage(),
708                ]);
709                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid availabilityStart date format'], 400);
710            }
711
712            try {
713                $endDate = new \DateTimeImmutable($availabilityEnd);
714            } catch (\Exception $e) {
715                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('changeAvailability - invalid availabilityEnd', [
716                    'user_id' => $user->getId(),
717                    'value'   => $availabilityEnd,
718                    'error'   => $e->getMessage(),
719                ]);
720                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid availabilityEnd date format'], 400);
721            }
722
723            $user->setAvailabilityStart($startDate);
724            $user->setAvailabilityEnd($endDate);
725            $em->persist($user);
726            $em->flush();
727
728            $this->papertrailLogger->info('✅ Availability updated', [
729                'user_id'           => $user->getId(),
730                'availabilityStart' => $availabilityStart,
731                'availabilityEnd'   => $availabilityEnd,
732            ]);
733
734            return new JsonResponse([
735                'success'           => true,
736                'message'           => 'Availability updated successfully',
737                'availabilityStart' => $user->getAvailabilityStart()?->format('Y-m-d'),
738                'availabilityEnd'   => $user->getAvailabilityEnd()?->format('Y-m-d'),
739            ], 200);
740
741        } catch (\Exception $e) {
742            $this->papertrailLogger->error('Error updating availability', [
743                'user_id' => $user->getId(),
744                'error'   => $e->getMessage(),
745            ]);
746            return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage()], 500);
747        }
748    }
749
750    #[Route('/api/user/projects', name: 'api_user_projects', methods: ['GET'])]
751    public function getUserProjects(Security $security): JsonResponse
752    {
753        $user = $security->getUser();
754
755        if (!$user instanceof User) {
756            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('getUserProjects - user not authenticated');
757            return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'User not authenticated'], 401);
758        }
759
760        try {
761            $projects = $user->getProject();
762
763            $this->papertrailLogger->info('User projects fetched', [
764                'user_id' => $user->getId(),
765                'count'   => count($projects),
766            ]);
767
768            $data = [];
769            foreach ($projects as $project) {
770                $data[] = [
771                    'id'             => $project->getId(),
772                    'name'           => $project->getName(),
773                    'description'    => $project->getDescription(),
774                    'requiredSkills' => $project->getRequiredSkills(),
775                    'startDate'      => $project->getStartDate()?->format('Y-m-d'),
776                    'endDate'        => $project->getEndDate()?->format('Y-m-d'),
777                ];
778            }
779
780            return new JsonResponse($data);
781        } catch (\Exception $e) {
782            $this->papertrailLogger->error('Error fetching user projects', [
783                'user_id' => $user->getId(),
784                'error'   => $e->getMessage(),
785            ]);
786            return new JsonResponse(['error' => 'Error fetching user projects', 'message' => $e->getMessage()], 500);
787        }
788    }
789
790    #[Route('/api/user/add/project', name: 'api_user_add_project', methods: ['POST'])]
791    public function addUserToProject(Request $request, Security $security, EntityManagerInterface $em): JsonResponse
792    {
793        $user = $security->getUser();
794
795        if (!$user instanceof User) {
796            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('addUserToProject - user not authenticated');
797            return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'User not authenticated'], 401);
798        }
799
800        try {
801            $data      = json_decode($request->getContent(), true);
802            $projectId = $data['project_id'] ?? null;
803
804            if (!$projectId) {
805                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('addUserToProject - missing project_id', ['user_id' => $user->getId()]);
806                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Project ID required'], 400);
807            }
808
809            $project = $em->getRepository(Project::class)->find($projectId);
810            if (!$project) {
811                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('addUserToProject - project not found', [
812                    'user_id'    => $user->getId(),
813                    'project_id' => $projectId,
814                ]);
815                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Project not found'], 404);
816            }
817
818            if ($user->getProject()->contains($project)) {
819                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('addUserToProject - user already in project', [
820                    'user_id'    => $user->getId(),
821                    'project_id' => $projectId,
822                ]);
823                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Already in this project'], 400);
824            }
825
826            $user->addProject($project);
827            $em->flush();
828
829            $this->papertrailLogger->info('✅ User added to project', [
830                'user_id'      => $user->getId(),
831                'project_id'   => $project->getId(),
832                'project_name' => $project->getName(),
833            ]);
834
835            return new JsonResponse([
836                'success'      => true,
837                'project_name' => $project->getName(),
838                'message'      => 'Added to project successfully'
839            ], 200);
840
841        } catch (\Exception $e) {
842            $this->papertrailLogger->error('Error adding user to project', [
843                'user_id' => $user->getId(),
844                'error'   => $e->getMessage(),
845            ]);
846            return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage()], 500);
847        }
848    }
849
850    #[Route('/api/user/delete/project', name: 'api_user_delete_project', methods: ['DELETE'])]
851    public function removeUserFromProject(Request $request, Security $security, EntityManagerInterface $em): JsonResponse
852    {
853        $user = $security->getUser();
854
855        if (!$user instanceof User) {
856            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('removeUserFromProject - user not authenticated');
857            return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'User not authenticated'], 401);
858        }
859
860        try {
861            $data      = json_decode($request->getContent(), true);
862            $projectId = $data['project_id'] ?? null;
863
864            if (!$projectId) {
865                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('removeUserFromProject - missing project_id', ['user_id' => $user->getId()]);
866                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Project ID required'], 400);
867            }
868
869            $project = $em->getRepository(Project::class)->find($projectId);
870            if (!$project) {
871                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('removeUserFromProject - project not found', [
872                    'user_id'    => $user->getId(),
873                    'project_id' => $projectId,
874                ]);
875                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Project not found'], 404);
876            }
877
878            if (!$user->getProject()->contains($project)) {
879                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('removeUserFromProject - user not in project', [
880                    'user_id'    => $user->getId(),
881                    'project_id' => $projectId,
882                ]);
883                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'User is not in this project'], 400);
884            }
885
886            $user->removeUserProject($project);
887            $em->flush();
888
889            $this->papertrailLogger->info('✅ User removed from project', [
890                'user_id'      => $user->getId(),
891                'project_id'   => $project->getId(),
892                'project_name' => $project->getName(),
893            ]);
894
895            return new JsonResponse([
896                'success'      => true,
897                'project_name' => $project->getName(),
898                'message'      => 'Removed from project successfully'
899            ], 200);
900
901        } catch (\Exception $e) {
902            $this->papertrailLogger->error('Error removing user from project', [
903                'user_id' => $user->getId(),
904                'error'   => $e->getMessage(),
905            ]);
906            return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage()], 500);
907        }
908    }

910    #[Route('/api/invitations/received', name: 'app_received_invitations', methods: ['GET'])]
911    public function getReceivedInvitations(Security $security): JsonResponse
912    {
913        $user = $security->getUser();
914        if (!$user instanceof User) {
915            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('getReceivedInvitations - user not authenticated');
916            return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'User not authenticated'], 401);
917        }
918
919        $received = [];
920        foreach ($user->getReceivedInvitations() as $sender) {
921            if (!$user->getFriends()->contains($sender)) {
922                $received[] = [
923                    'id'        => $sender->getId(),
924                    'firstName' => $sender->getFirstName(),
925                    'lastName'  => $sender->getLastName(),
926                    'email'     => $sender->getEmail(),
927                ];
928            }
929        }
930
931        $this->papertrailLogger->info('Received invitations fetched', [
932            'user_id' => $user->getId(),
933            'count'   => count($received),
934        ]);
935
936        return new JsonResponse($received);
937    }

968    #[Route('/api/user/friends', name: 'api_user_friends', methods: ['GET'])]
969    public function getUserFriends(Security $security): JsonResponse
970    {
971        $user = $security->getUser();
972        if (!$user instanceof User) {
973            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('getUserFriends - user not authenticated');
974            return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'User not authenticated'], 401);
975        }
976
977        try {
978            $friends = $user->getFriends();

980            $this->papertrailLogger->info('User friends fetched', [

982                'count'   => count($friends),

984

992                ];
993            }
994
995            return new JsonResponse($data);
996        } catch (\Exception $e) {
997            $this->papertrailLogger->error('Error fetching user friends', [

999                'error'   => $e->getMessage(),
1000            ]);
1001            return new JsonResponse(['error' => 'Error fetching user friends', 'message' => $e->getMessage()], 500);
1002        }

1005    #[Route('/api/delete/friends/{id}', name: 'api_delete_friend', methods: ['DELETE'])]
1006    public function deleteFriend(int $id, Security $security, EntityManagerInterface $em): JsonResponse
1007    {
1008        $user = $security->getUser();
1009
1010        if (!$user instanceof User) {
1011            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('deleteFriend - user not authenticated');
1012            return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Utilisateur non authentifié'], 401);
1013        }
1014
1015        $friend = $em->getRepository(User::class)->find($id);
1016        if (!$friend) {
1017            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('deleteFriend - friend not found', [
1018                'user_id'   => $user->getId(),
1019                'friend_id' => $id,
1020            ]);
1021            return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Ami introuvable'], 404);
1022        }
1023
1024        if (!$user->getFriends()->contains($friend)) {
1025            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('deleteFriend - not in friend list', [
1026                'user_id'   => $user->getId(),
1027                'friend_id' => $id,
1028            ]);
1029            return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Cet utilisateur n\'est pas dans votre liste d\'amis'], 400);
1030        }
1031
1032        $user->removeFriend($friend);
1033        $friend->removeFriend($user);
1034        $em->flush();
1035
1036        $this->papertrailLogger->info('✅ Friend removed', [
1037            'user_id'   => $user->getId(),
1038            'friend_id' => $id,
1039        ]);
1040
1041        return new JsonResponse(['success' => true, 'message' => 'Ami supprimé avec succès']);
1042    }
1043
1044    #[Route('api/send/invitation', name: 'api_send_invitation', methods: ['POST'])]
1045    public function sendInvitation(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em, Security $security): JsonResponse
1046    {
1047        $user = $security->getUser();
1048        if (!$user instanceof User) {
1049            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('sendInvitation - user not authenticated');
1050            return new JsonResponse(['message' => 'User not authenticated'], 401);
1051        }
1052
1053        try {
1054            $data     = json_decode($request->getContent(), true);
1055            $friendId = $data['friend_id'] ?? null;
1056
1057            if (!$friendId) {
1058                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('sendInvitation - missing friend_id', ['user_id' => $user->getId()]);
1059                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Friend ID required'], 400);
1060            }
1061
1062            $friend = $em->getRepository(User::class)->find($friendId);
1063            if (!$friend) {
1064                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('sendInvitation - target user not found', [
1065                    'user_id'   => $user->getId(),
1066                    'friend_id' => $friendId,
1067                ]);
1068                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'User not found'], 404);
1069            }
1070
1071            if ($user->getFriends()->contains($friend)) {
1072                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('sendInvitation - already friends', [
1073                    'user_id'   => $user->getId(),
1074                    'friend_id' => $friendId,
1075                ]);
1076                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Vous êtes déjà amis'], 400);
1077            }
1078
1079            if ($user->getSentInvitations()->contains($friend)) {
1080                $this->papertrailLogger->warning('sendInvitation - invitation already sent', [
1081                    'user_id'   => $user->getId(),
1082                    'friend_id' => $friendId,
1083                ]);
1084                return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Invitation déjà envoyée'], 400);
1085            }
1086
1087            $user->addSentInvitation($friend);
1088            $em->flush();
1089
1090            $this->papertrailLogger->info('✅ Invitation sent', [
1091                'user_id'   => $user->getId(),
1092                'friend_id' => $friendId,
1093            ]);
1094
1095            return new JsonResponse(['success' => true, 'message' => 'Invitation envoyée avec succès'], 200);
1096
1097        } catch (\Exception $e) {
1098            $this->papertrailLogger->error('Error sending invitation', [
1099                'user_id' => $user->getId(),
1100                'error'   => $e->getMessage(),
1101            ]);
1102            return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage()], 500);
1103        }
1104    }
1105
1106    #[Route('/api/invitations/accept/{senderId}', name: 'api_accept_invitation', methods: ['POST'])]
1107    public function acceptInvitation(int $senderId, Security $security, EntityManagerInterface $em): JsonResponse
1108    {
1109        $user = $security->getUser();
1110
1111        if (!$user instanceof User) {
1112            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('acceptInvitation - user not authenticated');
1113            return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Utilisateur non authentifié'], 401);
1114        }
1115
1116        $sender = $em->getRepository(User::class)->find($senderId);
1117        if (!$sender) {
1118            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('acceptInvitation - sender not found', [
1119                'user_id'   => $user->getId(),
1120                'sender_id' => $senderId,
1121            ]);
1122            return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Utilisateur expéditeur non trouvé'], 404);
1123        }
1124
1125        if (!$user->getReceivedInvitations()->contains($sender)) {
1126            $this->papertrailLogger->warning('acceptInvitation - no invitation found', [
1127                'user_id'   => $user->getId(),
1128                'sender_id' => $senderId,
1129            ]);
1130            return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Aucune invitation trouvée.'], 404);
1131        }
1132
1133        try {
1134            $user->getReceivedInvitations()->removeElement($sender);
1135            $sender->getSentInvitations()->removeElement($user);
1136
1137            $user->addFriend($sender);
1138            $sender->addFriend($user);
1139
1140            $em->persist($user);
1141            $em->persist($sender);
1142            $em->flush();
1143
1144            $this->papertrailLogger->info('✅ Invitation accepted', [
1145                'user_id'   => $user->getId(),
1146                'sender_id' => $senderId,
1147            ]);
1148
1149            return new JsonResponse(['success' => true, 'message' => 'Invitation acceptée. Vous êtes maintenant amis.']);
1150
1151        } catch (\Exception $e) {
1152            $this->papertrailLogger->error('Error accepting invitation', [
1153                'user_id'   => $user->getId(),
1154                'sender_id' => $senderId,
1155                'error'     => $e->getMessage(),
1156            ]);
1157            return new JsonResponse(['success' => false, 'message' => 'Erreur serveur: ' . $e->getMessage()], 500);
1158        }
1159    }
1160

1188        try {

1202

1204            $this->papertrailLogger->error('Error deleting received invitation', [

1213    #[Route('/api/invitations/delete-sent/{receiverId}', name: 'api_delete_sent_invitation', methods: ['DELETE'])]
